testcase.name: test_ask_stories
testcase.failure:
self = <tests.test_ask_stories.TestAskStories testMethod=test_ask_stories>
def test_ask_stories(self): > future = self.hn.ask_stories(limit=10) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
tests/test_ask_stories.py:24: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ hackernews/__init__.py:323: in ask_stories ask_stories = self._get_stories('askstories', limit) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ hackernews/__init__.py:163: in _get_stories story_ids = self._get_sync(url)[:limit] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <hackernews.HackerNews object at 0x107ab7750> url = 'https://hacker-news.firebaseio.com/v0/askstories.json'
def _get_sync(self, url): """Internal method used for GET requests
Args: url (str): URL to fetch
Returns: Individual URL request's response
Raises: HTTPError: If HTTP request failed. """ future = self.session.get(url) response = future.result() > if response.status_code == requests.codes.ok: ^^^^^^^^ E NameError: name 'requests' is not defined
hackernews/__init__.py:88: NameError

skipped.message: Skip for timeout issue due to long runtime

testcase.skipped: /Users/nelsonmbigili/Desktop/Spring 2026/Software Analysis/migratelib-artifact/repos/avinassh@haxor__8c0cb6be__requests__requests_futures/tests/test_get_all.py:21: Skip for timeout issue due to long runtime

testcase.name: test_get_async_error
testcase.failure:
self = <tests.test_get_async.TestGetAsync testMethod=test_get_async_error>
def test_get_async_error(self): future = self.hn.session.get(self.err_url) # Use get method of FuturesSession response = future.result() # Get the result of the future > self.assertEqual(response, None) E AssertionError: <Response [401]> != None
tests/test_get_async.py:32: AssertionError

def _get_sync(self, url): """Internal method used for GET requests
Args: url (str): URL to fetch
Returns: Individual URL request's response
Raises: HTTPError: If HTTP request failed. """ future = self.session.get(url) response = future.result() > if response.status_code == requests.codes.ok: ^^^^^^^^ E NameError: name 'requests' is not defined

def _get_sync(self, url): """Internal method used for GET requests
Args: url (str): URL to fetch
Returns: Individual URL request's response
